title: puccinellia distans var. convoluta
intro: Puccinellia distans var. convoluta, also known as convolvuted puccinellia, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Convoluted puccinellia is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb have not been extensively scientifically studied.
